title: Object Detection Part 4: Fast Detection Models
full_text: <!-- Part 4 of the "Object Detection for Dummies" series focuses on one-stage models for fast detection, including SSD, RetinaNet, and models in the YOLO family. These models skip the explicit region proposal stage but apply the detection directly on dense sampled areas. --> <p>In <a href="https://lilianweng.github.io/posts/2017-12-31-object-recognition-part-3/">Part 3</a>, we have reviewed models in the R-CNN family.
